_comment: Disney Song Catalog — 40 Hindi/English pairs for musically-aligned translation

songs.name: let_it_go_frozen
songs.title: Let It Go — Frozen (2013)
songs.notes: Hindi: Sunidhi Chauhan 'Fanna Ho'. English: Idina Menzel sing-along.

songs.name: into_the_unknown_frozen2
songs.title: Into the Unknown — Frozen 2 (2019)
songs.notes: Hindi: Sunidhi Chauhan official. English: Idina Menzel + AURORA.

songs.name: do_you_want_to_build_a_snowman_frozen
songs.title: Do You Want to Build a Snowman — Frozen (2013)
songs.notes: Hindi: Walt Disney India upload. English: sing-along. Narrative progression song.

songs.name: for_the_first_time_in_forever_frozen
songs.title: For the First Time in Forever — Frozen (2013)
songs.notes: Hindi: Walt Disney India. English: Kristen Bell + Idina Menzel sing-along.

songs.name: show_yourself_frozen2
songs.title: Show Yourself — Frozen 2 (2019)
songs.notes: Hindi: Sunidhi Chauhan + Smita Malhotra 'Tu Kon Hai'. English: Idina Menzel + Evan Rachel Wood.

songs.name: some_things_never_change_frozen2
songs.title: Some Things Never Change — Frozen 2 (2019)
songs.notes: Hindi: Walt Disney India ensemble. English: official. Family ensemble number.

songs.name: a_whole_new_world_aladdin
songs.title: A Whole New World — Aladdin (1992/2019)
songs.notes: Hindi: animated Hindi dub (1992). English: 1992 animated. Duet.

songs.name: friend_like_me_aladdin
songs.title: Friend Like Me — Aladdin (1992)
songs.notes: Hindi: animated dub. English: Robin Williams. Very fast lyrics.

songs.name: prince_ali_aladdin
songs.title: Prince Ali — Aladdin (1992)
songs.notes: Hindi: animated dub. English: HD original. Marching-parade style.

songs.name: arabian_nights_aladdin
songs.title: Arabian Nights — Aladdin (1992)
songs.notes: Hindi: animated dub. English: HD original. Short — good pipeline test.

songs.name: speechless_aladdin_2019
songs.title: Speechless — Aladdin (2019)
songs.notes: Hindi: 2019 live-action Hindi video. English: Naomi Scott official. Power ballad.

songs.name: hakuna_matata_lion_king
songs.title: Hakuna Matata — The Lion King (1994)
songs.notes: Hindi: official soundtrack. English: 1994 original.

songs.name: circle_of_life_lion_king
songs.title: Circle of Life — The Lion King (1994)
songs.notes: Hindi: subs+trans. English: Carmen Twillie + Lebo M. Choral.

songs.name: i_just_cant_wait_to_be_king_lion_king
songs.title: I Just Can't Wait to Be King — The Lion King (1994)
songs.notes: Hindi: subs+trans. English: Disney sing-along. Upbeat, young Simba.

songs.name: can_you_feel_the_love_tonight_lion_king
songs.title: Can You Feel the Love Tonight — The Lion King (1994/2019)
songs.notes: Hindi: 2019 version (Armaan Malik + Sunidhi Chauhan). English: 1994 animated. Duet.

songs.name: be_prepared_lion_king
songs.title: Be Prepared — The Lion King (1994)
songs.notes: Hindi: 1994 dub. English: Disney sing-along. Scar's villain song.

songs.name: bare_necessities_jungle_book
songs.title: The Bare Necessities — The Jungle Book (1967/2016)
songs.notes: Hindi: 2016 theatrical. English: Phil Harris sing-along.

songs.name: colors_of_the_wind_pocahontas
songs.title: Colors of the Wind — Pocahontas (1995)
songs.notes: Hindi: classic dub. English: Disney sing-along.

songs.name: reflection_mulan
songs.title: Reflection — Mulan (1998/2020)
songs.notes: Hindi: Sunayana Sarkar 'Parchhaai'. English: Disney sing-along.

songs.name: ill_make_a_man_out_of_you_mulan
songs.title: I'll Make a Man Out of You — Mulan (1998)
songs.notes: Hindi: Disney India dub. English: Donny Osmond. Training montage.

songs.name: under_the_sea_little_mermaid
songs.title: Under the Sea — The Little Mermaid (1989)
songs.notes: Hindi: Vishwajeet Mukherjee 'Samundar Mein'. English: official. Fast-paced.

songs.name: part_of_your_world_little_mermaid
songs.title: Part of Your World — The Little Mermaid (1989)
songs.notes: Hindi: Chandreyee Bhattacharya. English: Jodi Benson original.

songs.name: be_our_guest_beauty_beast
songs.title: Be Our Guest — Beauty and the Beast (1991)
songs.notes: Hindi: classic dub. English: original animated. Show-tune.

songs.name: beauty_and_the_beast_title
songs.title: Beauty and the Beast (Title Song) — Beauty and the Beast (1991)
songs.notes: Hindi: Smita Malhotra. English: 'Tale as Old as Time' theme. Romantic ballad.

songs.name: something_there_beauty_beast
songs.title: Something There — Beauty and the Beast (1991)
songs.notes: Hindi: classic dub. English: bonding-montage song. Several short character verses.

songs.name: how_far_ill_go_moana
songs.title: How Far I'll Go — Moana (2016)
songs.notes: Hindi: Shruti Rane 'Manzil Hai Jo'. English: Auli'i Cravalho.

songs.name: youre_welcome_moana
songs.title: You're Welcome — Moana (2016)
songs.notes: Hindi: Shamit Tyagi 'Tathastu'. English: Dwayne Johnson. Rap-like.

songs.name: where_you_are_moana
songs.title: Where You Are — Moana (2016)
songs.notes: Hindi: dubbed version. English: sing-along. Ensemble village song.

songs.name: shiny_moana
songs.title: Shiny — Moana (2016)
songs.notes: Hindi: movie version. English: Jemaine Clement as Tamatoa. Villain song.

songs.name: we_know_the_way_moana
songs.title: We Know the Way — Moana (2016)
songs.notes: Hindi: Disney India dub. English: Lin-Manuel Miranda + Opetaia Foa'i. Partly Tokelauan.

songs.name: remember_me_coco
songs.title: Remember Me — Coco (2017)
songs.notes: Hindi: 'Na Bhoolana' lullaby. English: lullaby sing-along.

songs.name: world_es_mi_familia_coco
songs.title: The World Es Mi Familia — Coco (2017)
songs.notes: Hindi: official HQ dub. English: Anthony Gonzalez + Antonio Sol. Energetic stage performance.

songs.name: i_see_the_light_tangled
songs.title: I See the Light — Tangled (2010)
songs.notes: Hindi: subs+trans. English: Mandy Moore + Zachary Levi. Duet.

songs.name: when_will_my_life_begin_tangled
songs.title: When Will My Life Begin — Tangled (2010)
songs.notes: Hindi: 'Meri Zindagi' full song. English: Mandy Moore sing-along.

songs.name: mother_knows_best_tangled
songs.title: Mother Knows Best — Tangled (2010)
songs.notes: Hindi: 'Maa Sab Janti Hai'. English: Donna Murphy sing-along. Villain song.

songs.name: we_dont_talk_about_bruno_encanto
songs.title: We Don't Talk About Bruno — Encanto (2021)
songs.notes: Hindi: subs+trans. English: official. Multi-voice, complex structure.

songs.name: waiting_on_a_miracle_encanto
songs.title: Waiting on a Miracle — Encanto (2021)
songs.notes: Hindi: Riya Duggal 'Ek Karishma'. English: Stephanie Beatriz. Solo, emotional.

songs.name: surface_pressure_encanto
songs.title: Surface Pressure — Encanto (2021)
songs.notes: Hindi: Disney India dub. English: Jessica Darrow as Luisa. Fast-paced.

songs.name: all_of_you_encanto
songs.title: All of You — Encanto (2021)
songs.notes: Hindi: Disney India dub. English: finale ensemble. Multi-voice, complex — verify alignment carefully.

songs.name: what_else_can_i_do_encanto
songs.title: What Else Can I Do? — Encanto (2021)
songs.notes: Hindi: Disney India dub. English: Diane Guerrero + Stephanie Beatriz. Isabela + Mirabel duet.
